Bash(cd /c/WorkProject/FrontLayer_Portal_V.3 && git add css/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
move subscription-card background to icon in mini mode

In mini state, remove card background/padding and apply them directly
to subscription-icon so only the icon has the styled background box.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/WorkProject/FrontLayer_Portal_V.3 && git add css/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
move subscription background from card to icon in all states

Background, border-radius and padding now live on subscription-icon
so the styled box always wraps only the icon, in both open and mini modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/WorkProject/FrontLayer_Portal_V.3 && git add css/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
subscription background on card when open, on icon when mini

Open: background on subscription-card \(full card styled\)
Mini: card transparent, background moves to subscription-icon only

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/WorkProject/FrontLayer_Portal_V.3 && git add css/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
restore subscription-card background in peek \(hover-expand\) state

In peek mode background moves back to card \(same as open state\),
and subscription-icon background is cleared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

Bash(/c/Python314/python - << 'APPLY_END' import re, os BASE = 'C:/WorkProject/FrontLayer_Portal_V.3' path_html = BASE + '/users/users.html' path_css = BASE + '/users/css/users.css' path_js = BASE + '/users/js/users.js' # ================================================================ # Read files # ================================================================ with open\(path_html, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: html = f.read\(\) with open\(path_js, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: js = f.read\(\) # ================================================================ # CHANGE 1: Remove both expanded panels from #add-user-modal # ================================================================ PANELS_START = ' ' s = html.find\(PANELS_START\) e = html.find\(PANELS_END\) if s != -1 and e != -1 and e > s: html = html[:s] + html[e:] print\('Change 1: Removed expanded panels from #add-user-modal OK'\) else: print\('Change 1: FAILED s=%d e=%d' % \(s, e\)\) # ================================================================ # CHANGE 2: Exam modal footer — add modal__standalone-btn + panel button # ================================================================ OLD2 = \( ' ' \) NEW2 = \( ' \\n' ' ' \) if OLD2 in html: html = html.replace\(OLD2, NEW2\) print\('Change 2: Updated exam modal footer OK'\) else: print\('Change 2: FAILED - exam button not found'\) # ================================================================ # CHANGE 3: Group modal footer — add modal__standalone-btn + panel button # ================================================================ OLD3 = \( ' ' \) NEW3 = \( ' \\n' ' ' \) if OLD3 in html: html = html.replace\(OLD3, NEW3\) print\('Change 3: Updated group modal footer OK'\) else: print\('Change 3: FAILED - group button not found'\) # ================================================================ # Save HTML # ================================================================ with open\(path_html, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: f.write\(html\) print\('users.html saved.'\) # ================================================================ # CHANGE 4: Append panel mode CSS to users.css # ================================================================ panel_css = """ /* --------------------------------------------------------------- Panel Mode -- modal appears as expanded panel alongside add-user-modal --------------------------------------------------------------- */ /* When a modal opens in panel mode \(from inside add-user-modal\), it repositions itself to the left of the add-user container and becomes non-blocking \(pointer-events: none on root\). */ .modal--as-panel { pointer-events: none; } .modal--as-panel .modal__overlay { display: none; } .modal--as-panel .modal__container { pointer-events: all; /* Position to the LEFT of #add-user-modal container \(RTL: larger right value\) */ right: calc\(16px + 500px + 8px\); } /* Show/hide mode-specific action buttons */ .modal--as-panel .modal__standalone-btn { display: none !important; } .modal--as-panel .modal__panel-btn { display: block !important; } /* Hide bulk subtitle in panel mode \(no "N users selected" needed\) */ .modal--as-panel .modal__subtitle { display: none; } /* On tablet/mobile: panel mode behaves like a normal bottom-sheet modal */ @media \(max-width: 1023px\) { .modal--as-panel { pointer-events: all; } .modal--as-panel .modal__overlay { display: block; } .modal--as-panel .modal__container { right: 16px; } } """ with open\(path_css, 'a', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: f.write\(panel_css\) print\('Change 4: Panel mode CSS appended to users.css OK'\) # ================================================================ # CHANGE 5: Replace AddUserModal IIFE in users.js # ================================================================ OLD_START = \( '/* =================================================================\\n' ' Add User Modal\\n' ' ================================================================= */\\n' '\\n' 'const AddUserModal = \(\(\) => {' \) END_MARKER = \( '/* =================================================================\\n' ' Bulk Import Wizard' \) start_idx = js.find\(OLD_START\) end_idx = js.find\(END_MARKER\) if start_idx == -1: print\('Change 5: FAILED - AddUserModal start not found'\) elif end_idx == -1: print\('Change 5: FAILED - end marker not found'\) else: new_iife = \( '/* =================================================================\\n' ' Add User Modal\\n' ' ================================================================= */\\n' '\\n' "const AddUserModal = \(\(\) => {\\n" " 'use strict';\\n" "\\n" " let _initialized = false;\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Helpers ---- */\\n" " function _toPersian\(n\) {\\n" " return String\(n\).replace\(/\\\\d/g, d => '\\u06f0\\u06f1\\u06f2\\u06f3\\u06f4\\u06f5\\u06f6\\u06f7\\u06f8\\u06f9'[d]\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " function _formatPrice\(n\) {\\n" " return _toPersian\(n.toLocaleString\('en-US'\).replace\(/,/g, '\\u060c'\)\) + ' \\u062a\\u0648\\u0645\\u0627\\u0646';\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Open a shared modal in \\"panel mode\\" ---- */\\n" " function _openAsPanel\(modalId\) {\\n" " const el = document.getElementById\(modalId\);\\n" " if \(!el\) return;\\n" " el.classList.add\('modal--as-panel'\);\\n" " Modal.open\(modalId\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Read exam selections from shared modal DOM ---- */\\n" " function _getExamSummary\(\) {\\n" " const list = document.getElementById\('examBulkList'\);\\n" " if \(!list\) return { count: 0, total: 0 };\\n" " let total = 0;\\n" " const selected = list.querySelectorAll\('.exam-bulk__item--has-plan'\);\\n" " selected.forEach\(function \(item\) {\\n" " const activeBtn = item.querySelector\('.exam-bulk__plan--active'\);\\n" " if \(activeBtn\) total += parseInt\(activeBtn.dataset.price || '0', 10\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " return { count: selected.length, total };\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Read group selections from shared modal DOM ---- */\\n" " function _getGroupCount\(\) {\\n" " const list = document.querySelector\('.users-add-group-modal__list'\);\\n" " if \(!list\) return 0;\\n" " return list.querySelectorAll\('.users-add-group-modal__item--selected'\).length;\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Update exam trigger text in add-user-modal ---- */\\n" " function _updateExamTrigger\(\) {\\n" " const { count, total } = _getExamSummary\(\);\\n" " const textEl = document.getElementById\('add-user-test-trigger-text'\);\\n" " const metaEl = document.getElementById\('add-user-test-trigger-meta'\);\\n" " if \(textEl\) {\\n" " textEl.textContent = count > 0 ? _toPersian\(count\) + ' \\u0622\\u0632\\u0645\\u0648\\u0646 \\u0627\\u0646\\u062a\\u062e\\u0627\\u0628 \\u0634\\u062f\\u0647' : '\\u0622\\u0632\\u0645\\u0648\\u0646 \\u0627\\u0636\\u0627\\u0641\\u0647 \\u06a9\\u0646\\u06cc\\u062f..';\\n" " textEl.classList.toggle\('add-user-trigger__text--selected', count > 0\);\\n" " }\\n" " if \(metaEl\) {\\n" " metaEl.hidden = total === 0;\\n" " metaEl.innerHTML = total > 0 ? '' + _formatPrice\(total\) + '' : '';\\n" " }\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Update group trigger text in add-user-modal ---- */\\n" " function _updateGroupTrigger\(\) {\\n" " const count = _getGroupCount\(\);\\n" " const textEl = document.getElementById\('add-user-group-trigger-text'\);\\n" " if \(textEl\) {\\n" " textEl.textContent = count > 0 ? _toPersian\(count\) + ' \\u06af\\u0631\\u0648\\u0647 \\u0627\\u0646\\u062a\\u062e\\u0627\\u0628 \\u0634\\u062f\\u0647' : '\\u06af\\u0631\\u0648\\u0647 \\u0627\\u0636\\u0627\\u0641\\u0647 \\u06a9\\u0646\\u06cc\\u062f..';\\n" " textEl.classList.toggle\('add-user-trigger__text--selected', count > 0\);\\n" " }\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Reset triggers to default state ---- */\\n" " function _resetTriggers\(\) {\\n" " const testText = document.getElementById\('add-user-test-trigger-text'\);\\n" " if \(testText\) { testText.textContent = '\\u0622\\u0632\\u0645\\u0648\\u0646 \\u0627\\u0636\\u0627\\u0641\\u0647 \\u06a9\\u0646\\u06cc\\u062f..'; testText.classList.remove\('add-user-trigger__text--selected'\); }\\n" " const metaEl = document.getElementById\('add-user-test-trigger-meta'\);\\n" " if \(metaEl\) { metaEl.hidden = true; metaEl.innerHTML = ''; }\\n" " const groupText = document.getElementById\('add-user-group-trigger-text'\);\\n" " if \(groupText\) { groupText.textContent = '\\u06af\\u0631\\u0648\\u0647 \\u0627\\u0636\\u0627\\u0641\\u0647 \\u06a9\\u0646\\u06cc\\u062f..'; groupText.classList.remove\('add-user-trigger__text--selected'\); }\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* ---- Init ---- */\\n" " function _init\(\) {\\n" " if \(_initialized\) return;\\n" " _initialized = true;\\n" "\\n" " /* Exam trigger -> open exam modal in panel mode */\\n" " const testTrigger = document.getElementById\('add-user-test-trigger'\);\\n" " if \(testTrigger\) {\\n" " testTrigger.addEventListener\('click', function \(\) {\\n" " _openAsPanel\('users-add-exam-modal'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* Group trigger -> open group modal in panel mode */\\n" " const groupTrigger = document.getElementById\('add-user-group-trigger'\);\\n" " if \(groupTrigger\) {\\n" " groupTrigger.addEventListener\('click', function \(\) {\\n" " _openAsPanel\('users-add-group-modal'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* Save-and-return from exam modal in panel mode */\\n" " const examPanelSave = document.getElementById\('exam-panel-save-btn'\);\\n" " if \(examPanelSave\) {\\n" " examPanelSave.addEventListener\('click', function \(\) {\\n" " _updateExamTrigger\(\);\\n" " Modal.close\('users-add-exam-modal'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* Save-and-return from group modal in panel mode */\\n" " const groupPanelSave = document.getElementById\('group-panel-save-btn'\);\\n" " if \(groupPanelSave\) {\\n" " groupPanelSave.addEventListener\('click', function \(\) {\\n" " _updateGroupTrigger\(\);\\n" " Modal.close\('users-add-group-modal'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* Remove panel-mode class when those modals close \(any reason\) */\\n" " Modal.onClose\('users-add-exam-modal', function \(\) {\\n" " document.getElementById\('users-add-exam-modal'\)?.classList.remove\('modal--as-panel'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" "\\n" " Modal.onClose\('users-add-group-modal', function \(\) {\\n" " document.getElementById\('users-add-group-modal'\)?.classList.remove\('modal--as-panel'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" "\\n" " /* Submit add-user form */\\n" " const submitBtn = document.getElementById\('add-user-submit'\);\\n" " if \(submitBtn\) {\\n" " submitBtn.addEventListener\('click', function \(\) {\\n" " const code = document.getElementById\('add-user-code'\)?.value?.trim\(\);\\n" " if \(!code\) {\\n" " document.getElementById\('add-user-code'\)?.focus\(\);\\n" " return;\\n" " }\\n" " // TODO: POST to API\\n" " Modal.close\('add-user-modal'\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " /* When add-user-modal closes: close any open panel modals, reset triggers, clear fields */\\n" " Modal.onClose\('add-user-modal', function \(\) {\\n" " ['users-add-exam-modal', 'users-add-group-modal'].forEach\(function \(id\) {\\n" " const el = document.getElementById\(id\);\\n" " if \(el && el.classList.contains\('modal--open'\)\) {\\n" " Modal.close\(id\);\\n" " }\\n" " }\);\\n" " _resetTriggers\(\);\\n" " ['add-user-code', 'add-user-name', 'add-user-phone'].forEach\(function \(id\) {\\n" " const el = document.getElementById\(id\);\\n" " if \(el\) el.value = '';\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\);\\n" " }\\n" "\\n" " function open\(\) { Modal.open\('add-user-modal'\); }\\n" " function close\(\) { Modal.close\('add-user-modal'\); }\\n" "\\n" " /* Init on DOMContentLoaded so listeners are ready regardless of how the modal is opened */\\n" " document.addEventListener\('DOMContentLoaded', _init\);\\n" "\\n" " return { open, close };\\n" "}\)\(\);\\n" "\\n" \) js = js[:start_idx] + new_iife + js[end_idx:] with open\(path_js, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: f.write\(js\) print\('Change 5: AddUserModal IIFE replaced OK'\) print\('All done!'\) APPLY_END)
Bash(find ~/.claude/plugins -name "*.json" | xargs grep -l "designer" 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "---" && find ~/.claude/plugins -type d -name "designer" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if ''''figma'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''token'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''mcp'''' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
